subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Captive unto the captive, that He may cause him to soar in the atmosphere of yearning in such wise that no sorrow shall afflict him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الاسیر الی الاسیر لیجعله طائرا فی هواء الاشتیاق علی شان لا تحزنه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
